title: ActionPlan
description: The full plan of file writes, shell commands, and remote mutations that bootstrap.sh executes. Every destructive path is expressed here so preview.sh can render a preview.

preview_blob.description: Filesystem path to a tempfile holding the would-be merged content (v1.7.0). Set by bin/render-plan.sh for merge actions whose producing subsystem supports --output (gitignore-combiner, gen-claudemd). bin/preview.sh diffs this against the current file; bin/bootstrap.sh `cp`s from it instead of re-invoking the producer, so the preview-confirmed bytes are exactly what lands on disk.

current_bytes.description: Size of the existing target file (or 0 if absent). Set by render-plan.sh alongside preview_blob so the operator sees `→ merged` size deltas without preview re-stat'ing the path.
